nodes.name: Fetch All Teller Data
nodes.notes: Fetches all accounts, balances, and transactions from Teller API using mTLS certificates. Requires NODE_FUNCTION_ALLOW_BUILTIN=https,fs environment variable.

parameters.jsCode:
const data = $input.first().json;
return data.accounts.map(a => ({ json: a }));

const data = $input.first().json;
return data.balances.map(b => ({ json: b }));

const data = $input.first().json;
return data.transactions.map(t => ({ json: t }));

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO raw.raw_teller_accounts (
  teller_account_id, enrollment_id, institution_name, institution_id,
  account_name, account_type, account_subtype, account_status,
  currency, last_four, updated_at
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.teller_account_id }}',
  '{{ $json.enrollment_id }}',
  '{{ $json.institution_name }}',
  '{{ $json.institution_id }}',
  '{{ $json.account_name }}',
  '{{ $json.account_type }}',
  '{{ $json.account_subtype }}',
  '{{ $json.account_status }}',
  '{{ $json.currency }}',
  '{{ $json.last_four }}',
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
)
ON CONFLICT (teller_account_id) DO UPDATE SET
  enrollment_id = EXCLUDED.enrollment_id,
  institution_name = EXCLUDED.institution_name,
  institution_id = EXCLUDED.institution_id,
  account_name = EXCLUDED.account_name,
  account_type = EXCLUDED.account_type,
  account_subtype = EXCLUDED.account_subtype,
  account_status = EXCLUDED.account_status,
  currency = EXCLUDED.currency,
  last_four = EXCLUDED.last_four,
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

INSERT INTO raw.raw_teller_transactions (
  teller_transaction_id, teller_account_id, transaction_date, description,
  amount, status, type, category, merchant_name, merchant_category,
  running_balance, updated_at
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.teller_transaction_id }}',
  '{{ $json.teller_account_id }}',
  '{{ $json.transaction_date }}',
  '{{ ($json.description || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  {{ $json.amount }},
  '{{ ($json.status || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.type || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.category || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.merchant_name || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.merchant_category || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  {{ $json.running_balance || 'null' }},
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
)
ON CONFLICT (teller_transaction_id) DO UPDATE SET
  description = EXCLUDED.description,
  amount = EXCLUDED.amount,
  status = EXCLUDED.status,
  type = EXCLUDED.type,
  category = EXCLUDED.category,
  merchant_name = EXCLUDED.merchant_name,
  merchant_category = EXCLUDED.merchant_category,
  running_balance = EXCLUDED.running_balance,
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

nodes.name: Upsert Transactions
nodes.notes: Escapes apostrophes in string fields to prevent SQL injection errors

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { status: 'completed', timestamp: new Date().toISOString() } }];
